findings.title: AWS secret access key committed to source
findings.description: A live AWS secret access key was found hardcoded in a config file. Exposed cloud credentials can allow full account takeover.

findings.title: Stripe live API key in test fixture
findings.description: A Stripe live secret key (sk_live_...) was committed inside a test fixture. Attackers could issue refunds or read customer payment data.

findings.title: Slack webhook URL in commit history
findings.description: An incoming Slack webhook URL was found in git history. Could be abused to post spoofed messages to an internal channel.
